name: compress-shader-literals
description: Size matters. Minify GLSL/WGSL shader template literals at build time — universal plugin for Vite, Rollup, webpack, esbuild & more.
author: jayF0x

scripts.build: bun build src/plugin.js --outdir dist --entry-naming index.js --target node --format esm --external @babel/parser --external @babel/traverse --external @rollup/pluginutils --external byte-snap --external magic-string --external unplugin && cp src/index.d.ts dist/index.d.ts && node scripts/compress-dist.js
scripts.test:validate: cd tests && bun install && node validate.js
scripts.test:e2e: cd tests && bun install && node e2e.js
scripts.rm:stalepr: git branch -vv | grep '\[gone\]' | awk '{print $1}' | xargs git branch -D
